landing.title: prevuiw
landing.subtitle: Paste your URL. Get instant team feedback.
landing.noSignup: No sign-up required for your first preview
landing.heroSubtitle: Your team reviews Figma designs with pinned comments. Do the same for live websites. Paste a URL, share the link, get visual feedback in seconds.
landing.oldWay2: Draw arrows in a markup tool
landing.oldWay3: Post in Slack with a paragraph of context
landing.newWay2: Click directly on the live site to comment
landing.newWay3: Everyone sees feedback in context, in real time
landing.demoSubtitle: Your team reviews directly on the live site — no screenshots, no guessing.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps. No setup. No installs.
landing.step1Desc: Any deployment URL. Vercel, Netlify, localhost tunnels.
landing.step2Desc: Send to your team. No account needed to review.
landing.step3Desc: Click anywhere on the live page to leave pinned comments.
landing.feature1Desc: Pin comments to exact pixels, or drag to highlight an area. No more "the thing on the left."
landing.feature2Desc: Track every deployment. Compare versions side by side. Comments stay attached to their version.
landing.feature3Desc: See who's viewing. Comments appear instantly for everyone. No refresh needed.
landing.feature4Desc: Reviewers just enter their name and start commenting. Zero friction for your team.
landing.platformsSubtitle: Every platform that gives you immutable deployment URLs works perfectly. Your review links stay valid forever.
landing.platformsAnyUrl: Non-immutable URLs work too. When you deploy a new version, we automatically capture screenshots of the previous version for permanent reference.
landing.ctaSubtitle: No credit card. No setup. Paste a URL and your team can start leaving feedback immediately.

dashboard.title: My Projects
dashboard.noProjects: No projects yet. Create one to get started!

version.noVersions: No versions yet. Add your first version!

guest.title: Enter your name
guest.description: Choose a display name to leave comments
